title: cleome linophylla
intro: Cleome linophylla, also known as the Mexican poppy or silver leaf, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cleome linophylla include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Herbal preparations of Cleome linophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
